_comment: STING corporate material packs — bound to Drawing Types via DrawingType.materialPack.

arch-baseline.name: Architectural baseline
arch-baseline.description: Default concrete / steel / glass / partition set for architectural sheets.

struct-baseline.name: Structural baseline
struct-baseline.description: Concrete grades + steel sections + foundations + rebar.

mep-coord-baseline.name: MEP coordination baseline
mep-coord-baseline.description: Duct + pipe + tray + conduit materials + matching MEP systems for coordination sheets.

healthcare-baseline.name: Healthcare baseline
healthcare-baseline.description: Antimicrobial finishes + radiation shielding + MGPS pipework.

fabrication-baseline.name: Fabrication baseline
fabrication-baseline.description: Spool / shop-drawing materials — gaskets, bolts, valve trim.
